ST-LINK SN  : 0675FF485550755187091234
ST-LINK FW  : V2J47M34
Board       : NUCLEO-F746ZG
Voltage     : 3.24V
SWD freq    : 4000 KHz
Connect mode: Normal
Reset mode  : Software reset
Device ID   : 0x449
Revision ID : Rev Z
Device name : STM32F74x/STM32F75x
NVM size  : 1 MBytes
Device type : MCU
Device CPU  : Cortex-M7
BL Version  : 0x90
Debug in Low Power mode enabled
